assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: The response clearly identifies dev clusters on Rapid channel and prod clusters on Stable channel throughout the checklists, with specific sections addressing the different environments

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Response mentions mandatory resource requests, notes that node pool management is handled by Google, and includes Autopilot-specific validation sections

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Includes specific kubectl command for checking deprecated APIs: 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated'

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'All containers have CPU/memory resource requests (mandatory in Autopilot)' and references this in post-upgrade validation

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes PDBs, terminationGracePeriodSeconds, and 'No bare pods — all workloads managed by Deployments/StatefulSets/Jobs'

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Includes specific gcloud commands to verify cluster versions: 'gcloud container clusters describe CLUSTER_1 --region REGION --format="value(currentMasterVersion)"'

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes extensive workload health checks: deployments, pods status, StatefulSets, HPA, and application health checks

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Dev clusters (Rapid) serving as canaries - monitor their health on 1.32' and 'use them to validate compatibility before your prod auto-upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Response mentions 72h scheduled upgrade notifications but does not mention checking GKE release schedule for ~1 month advance notice
Post-upgrade checklist includes comprehensive observability section covering metrics, logs, error rates, latency, and custom dashboards

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Response only mentions maintenance exclusions for delaying minor upgrades generally, not node-specific exclusions, which is appropriate for Autopilot
